videos.headline: Donovan Kaufman nabs pick-six for NC State
videos.description: Donovan Kaufman snags a tipped pass and houses a pick-six to bring NC State closer against Louisiana Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Donovan Kaufman nabs pick-six for NC State) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Donerio Davenport rushes in for 5-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Donerio Davenport rushes in for 5-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Donerio Davenport rushes in for 5-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tru Edwards takes a 71-yard catch to the house for Louisiana Tech
videos.description: Tru Edwards bounces off multiple defenders and takes a short pass 71 yards to the house for Louisiana Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tru Edwards takes a 71-yard catch to the house for Louisiana Tech) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: NC State's Kendrick Raphael punches in 3-yard score
videos.description: NC State take the lead against Louisiana Tech behind a 3-yard rushing score from Kenrick Raphael.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State's Kendrick Raphael punches in 3-yard score) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: C.J. Bailey powers into end zone to pad NC State's lead
videos.description: C.J. Bailey punches it in from the one-yard line to extend NC State's lead late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (C.J. Bailey powers into end zone to pad NC State's lead) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
